description: Gray vertical bars are recolored by their relative height or order. The geometry stays fixed; only gray 5 is replaced by colors 1 through 4.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_08ed6ac7(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, T)
    x2 = totuple(x1)
    x3 = order(x1, height)
    x4 = size(x2)
    x5 = interval(x4, ZERO, NEG_ONE)
    x6 = mpapply(recolor, x5, x3)
    O = paint(I, x6)
    return O
